_comment: Entra ID Conditional Access policy template. Ships in report-only state. Operator imports via 'New-MgIdentityConditionalAccessPolicy -BodyParameter (Get-Content -Raw ca-block-unmanaged-ai.json | ConvertFrom-Json)' and only flips state to 'enabled' after CISO sign-off.
displayName: KLZ — Block unmanaged AI app sign-ins (REPORT-ONLY)
